contact.serviceArea: Luxury picnic setups, proposal scenes, anniversary picnics, birthday lounges, small shower setups, add-on florals, pickup, setup, and teardown across parks, homes, and private venues

copy.eyebrow: Picnic and proposal setups with soft landing logistics
copy.heroText: Linen & Lantern creates styled picnic and proposal moments with linens, florals, cushions, timing notes, access planning, and a calm backup plan if weather gets theatrical.
copy.introText: We confirm occasion, location access, timing, guest count, palette, add-ons, and what should happen before and after the reveal.
copy.processTitle: How the setup lands on time
copy.quoteText: Check availability with date, location idea, guest count, occasion, color direction, and add-ons. We will suggest a setup path and timing window.

services.title: Classic Picnic
services.text: Low table, pillows, linens, tableware styling, florals, and a simple setup for birthdays, dates, or small gatherings.

services.title: Proposal Setup
services.text: A more intentional scene with florals, candles, timing notes, and a quiet reveal plan.

services.title: Add-On Moment
services.text: Dessert styling, extra florals, signage-free decor, sparkling water, or photo-ready finishing touches.

process.title: Choose the location
process.text: We check access, rules, parking, timing, shade, and weather before the look gets locked.

process.title: Style the setup
process.text: Palette, florals, seating, table details, and add-ons get translated into a practical setup plan.

process.title: Arrive before the moment
process.text: We set, style, photograph the handoff if needed, and return for teardown on schedule.

proof.label: no awkward cleanup after the moment
